entities.name: Google GenAI
entities.description: The new default API/library for LangChain.

entities.name: Google VertexAI
entities.description: The deprecated API/library that was previously the default for LangChain.

entities.name: LangChain
entities.description: A framework whose default API for Google services is being updated.

entities.name: Deprecation
entities.description: The status indicating that Google VertexAI is no longer recommended for use.

extracted_data.summary: This issue updates LangChain to default to `google_genai` instead of `google_vertexai` due to the deprecation of Vertex.
